title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform designed to maintain character consistency across multiple scenes and environments. It features storyboard mode for locking character appearance, multi-shot generation with camera presets, a built-in timeline editor, and an Extend tool for shots exceeding the 15-second limit, enabling end-to-end filmmaking within a browser without external editing software.
